title: phillyrea variabilis subsp. stricta
intro: Phillyrea variabilis subsp. stricta is a subspecies of the Phillyrea variabilis plant, also known as the mock privet, a flowering evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Phillyrea variabilis subsp. stricta include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, syrups, and salves for medicinal purposes.
